He’s created a sound all his own, fusing an array of musical influences that have shaped him as an artist, ranging from classical and cinematic to hip-hop, dance and 90s’ soul Tokio grew up in North London before being awarded a coveted piano scholarship at the Royal College of Music. A stint as a studio musician led to recording and touring with some of the biggest names in music including Amy Winehouse, The Police, Kanye West and Mr Hudson. Now those Tokio has recently released the beautiful single ‘Angel’ from his hotly anticipated album ‘Our Generation’ and it is absolutely gorgeous!

raw_evidence: The Olllam is a band that fuses Irish traditional music with the modern jazz/post-rock energy of Detroit. Led by uilleann piper John McSherry, the band features Joe Dart (Vulfpeck), Michael Shimmin, Ross Ainslie, Seán O’Meara, and Joe Hettinga Following their acclaimed album elllegy (RTÉ Radio 1 Best Group), The Olllam has collaborated with GRAMMY-nominated producer Zedd, shared the stage in Belfast with actor Anthony Boyle (Netflix’s House of Guinness), and recently completed a landmark U.S. tour in November 2025 From ancient airs to future soundscapes, The Olllam is not just carrying the tradition forward—they’re reinventing it

raw_evidence: Soul queens, jazz innovators and global icons – This International Women’s Day, we’re shining a spotlight on some of the artists who’ve played a defining role in the genres that sit at the heart of our programming Throughout the rest of Women’s History Month, we’ll be celebrating the women who shape Band on the Wall, from those working behind the scenes to trailblazing artists heading to our stage later this year Follow along as we celebrate the past, present and future of women in music Nina Simone expanded the possibilities of jazz, musically, emotionally and politically. Drawing on her classical training, she merged jazz with blues, folk and soul, reshaping vocal expression in the process. Her songs confronted civil rights and injustice with clarity and contro The Queen of Salsa, Celia brought explosive energy and unmistakable power to Afro-Cuban music. Her bold performances and vibrant voice helped globalise salsa, celebrating Caribbean identity while shaping dance music culture for generations Blending psychedelic soul with jazz, hip-hop and experimental production, Erykah Badu helped define the neo-soul movement through her distinctive voice and artistic independence. raw_evidence: The Only King is acclaimed as the first original Cantonese biblical musical to present the story of the Book of 1 Samuel in its entirety. The production follows the life of King Saul, from his anointing and rise to the throne to his gradual downfall through pride and disobedience First staged in 2005, The Only King enjoyed multiple sold-out performances in Hong Kong and is widely regarded as a landmark work in Chinese Christian musical theatre To mark the 20th anniversary of its premiere, The Only King was presented in London and Cambridge in January 2026, where it received enthusiastic responses and strong audience acclaim. Building on this success, the production will embark on a UK tour in September 2026, with perfo Performed in Cantonese with English subtitles Suitable for audiences aged 3 and above. Children under the age of 12 must be accompanied by an adult * These tickets include an exclusive souvenir

title: Young Musician's Summer School
summary: We’re inviting young people to explore music for film and compose their own soundtrack this summer! […] The post Young Musician’s Summer School appeared first on Band on the Wall
lead: We’re inviting young people to explore music for film and compose their own soundtrack this summer!
practical_angle: Официальная страница должна подтверждать время, вход и наличие билетов.
raw_evidence: Young Musician’s Summer School . Young Musician’s Summer School. . Book here . . . . . . . Friday | 03.07.2026 . . . World of Music . Share . . . . --> . . We’re inviting young people to explore music for film and compose their own soundtrack this summer! Whether your child already attends our Saturday Music Club , or just wants to try something new, our Young Musician’s Summer School is suitable for all abilities! . . . . . Across this 5 day course, we’ll be exploring music for film, and working on composing music for the silent film ‘A Trip to the Moon’. The course will conclude with a live performance soundtracking the film for family and friends. . . . . We welcome all abilities and instruments to take part in this course. You can bring your own instruments, but we have keyboards, guitars, bass, violins, drums and percussion on site which can be used if you don’t have an instrument.. . . Snacks and drinks provided, and pizzas on the final day. Please bring your own packed lunch to sessions Monday-Thursday.. . Dates: Monday 17th – Friday 21st August. Times: 10:00-16:30 Monday-Thursday, then a performance for friends and family on Friday at 13:00 (students will be expected to come in at 10:00 sharp on the Friday).. Ages: 12-18 years old. Cost: £150 for the full course. Bursaries are available for those on lower income – please email learning@bandonthewall.org to arrange this.. . Spaces are limited – Book here . . . Please email learning@bandonthewall.org if you have any questions about this course

raw_evidence: The Only King is acclaimed as the first original Cantonese biblical musical to present the story of the Book of 1 Samuel in its entirety. The production follows the life of King Saul, from his anointing and rise to the throne to his gradual downfall through pride and disobedience First staged in 2005, The Only King enjoyed multiple sold-out performances in Hong Kong and is widely regarded as a landmark work in Chinese Christian musical theatre To mark the 20th anniversary of its premiere, The Only King was presented in London and Cambridge in January 2026, where it received enthusiastic responses and strong audience acclaim. Building on this success, the production will embark on a UK tour in September 2026, with perfo Performed in Cantonese with English subtitles Suitable for audiences aged 3 and above. Children under the age of 12 must be accompanied by an adult * These tickets include an exclusive souvenir

lead: RNCM | Live Nation in association with UTA | 2026-09-27 | tickets

draft_line: • Mike Rice — 27 сентября, RNCM (Live Nation in association with UTA). Фестивальный состав, не один артист.
raw_evidence: There’s a cruelty to Mike Rice, a wickedness. In this show Mike talks about doing psychedelics with his brother, an entanglement with a Spanish Sausage Dog named Nino, and many other such rotten adventures ‘ Ireland has yet another legendary comedian ‘ – Dan Nightingale Irish farmer’s son, and general Nasty Character Mike Rice is one of Ireland and the UK’s fastest rising comedy stars. Having started comedy in 2016 Mike has amassed a large online following from podcast and stand-up clips, regularly getting millions of views on various platforms Mike began stand-up comedy in Chicago, where within two years he was working regularly at the most prestigious clubs in the city, including The Laugh Factory. He has since returned home because his mother made him, and has been quickly rising in the Irish and European scene, play Mike brought his first solo show The Best Boy in Ireland to the Edinburgh Fringe Festival 2018, in what was a sold-out run, and performed that same show to sold-out rooms at the Perth Fringe Festival in 2019 As well as co-hosting Mike & Vittorio’s Guide to Parenting with Vittorio Angelone, and Big Mike and The Chief with Rob Moriarty, Mike has appeared multiple times on smash hit podcast Have a Word and released his first comedy special in October 2023
